textLink.title: TextLink
textLink.description: Inline text link that automatically shows an external-tab icon when it opens a new tab.

breadcrumb.title: Breadcrumb
breadcrumb.description: Displays the path to the current resource using a hierarchy of links.

tabs.title: Tabs
tabs.description: A set of layered sections of content—known as tab panels—that are displayed one at a time.

pagination.title: Pagination
pagination.description: Navigation controls for traversing paged content.

pageAside.title: PageAside
pageAside.description: Responsive page support layout that renders supporting information as a right rail on wide screens and a collapsible block on narrow screens.

navigationMenu.title: NavigationMenu
navigationMenu.description: Top-nav with mega-menu dropdowns for site navigation.

sidebar.title: Sidebar
sidebar.description: Full sidebar orchestrator with provider, header, nav items, and footer slots.

sidebarItem.title: SidebarItem
sidebarItem.description: Nested sidebar row with chevron, icon, label, and counter area.

menubar.title: Menubar
menubar.description: Top application menu with trigger items and nested submenu entry.

command.title: Command
command.description: Fast, composable, unstyled command menu for React.

appRail.title: App Rail
appRail.description: Primary vertical icon rail used for application-wide navigation.

commandPalette.title: Command Palette
commandPalette.description: Global quick-action launcher with grouped commands and keyboard shortcuts.

rightRail.title: Right Rail
rightRail.description: Secondary side panel for contextual tools and inspector content.

header.title: Header
header.description: Top navigation bar with logo, primary nav, and right-aligned actions.

footer.title: Footer
footer.description: Standard footer with brand, link sections, and copyright row.

documentPager.title: DocumentPager
documentPager.description: Adjacent-document navigation with preview thumbnail, category label, title, and description.
